all.en: TO: All Westfield Holdings Employees
all.zh: 致：Westfield Holdings 全體員工

all.en: FROM: Margaret Chen, Director of Operations
all.zh: 發信人：營運總監 Margaret Chen

all.en: DATE: June 3
all.zh: 日期：6月3日

all.en: SUBJECT: Headquarters Relocation Announcement
all.zh: 主旨：總部搬遷公告

all.en: I am pleased to announce that Westfield Holdings will be relocating its headquarters next month.
all.zh: 我很高興宣布，Westfield Holdings 將於下個月搬遷其總部。

all.en: Our new office is located at 482 Riverside Boulevard, Suite 1500, in the Harbor Financial District.
all.zh: 我們的新辦公室位於 Harbor 金融區的 Riverside 大道 482 號 1500 室。

all.en: The new facility offers nearly 40 percent more workspace and modern conference rooms equipped with the latest video conferencing technology.
all.zh: 新場地提供將近 40% 更多的工作空間，以及配備最新視訊會議技術的現代化會議室。

all.en: The official move will take place over the weekend of July 18 and 19.
all.zh: 正式搬遷將於 7 月 18 日至 19 日週末進行。

all.en: Employees should report to the new location starting Monday, July 21.
all.zh: 員工應於 7 月 21 日星期一起到新地點報到。

all.en: Before the move, please pack all personal belongings and non-essential documents into the labeled boxes provided by the facilities team.
all.zh: 搬遷前，請將所有個人物品及非必要文件裝入設施團隊提供的有標籤紙箱中。

all.en: Each box must be clearly marked with your name, department, and new desk number.
all.zh: 每個箱子必須清楚標示您的姓名、部門及新座位號碼。

all.en: Computers, monitors, and office phones will be transferred and reinstalled by our IT vendor.
all.zh: 電腦、螢幕及辦公室電話將由我們的 IT 廠商搬運並重新安裝。

all.en: Parking permits for the new building can be requested through the human resources portal until July 10.
all.zh: 新大樓的停車證可於 7 月 10 日前透過人力資源入口網站申請。

all.en: A shuttle service will run between the nearest subway station and the new office during the first two weeks.
all.zh: 前兩週將提供穿梭巴士服務往返最近的地鐵站與新辦公室之間。

all.en: Please note that the main phone number and all employee email addresses will remain unchanged.
all.zh: 請注意，總機電話號碼及所有員工電子郵件地址將維持不變。

all.en: An open house and welcome reception will be held on Friday, July 25, from 4:00 to 6:00 P.M.
all.zh: 將於 7 月 25 日星期五下午 4 點至 6 點舉辦開幕及歡迎酒會。

all.en: If you have any questions or special accommodation needs, please contact the relocation committee at relocate@westfield.com.
all.zh: 如有任何疑問或特殊安排需求，請聯絡搬遷委員會：relocate@westfield.com。

all.en: We appreciate your patience and cooperation during this exciting transition.
all.zh: 感謝您在這次令人興奮的轉變期間給予的耐心與配合。

all.en: Department managers should submit final seating charts to the facilities team no later than July 8.
all.zh: 部門主管應於 7 月 8 日前將最終座位表提交給設施團隊。

all.en: Any oversized equipment or specialty items must be reported in advance for proper handling and insurance coverage.
all.zh: 任何過大型設備或特殊物品必須事先回報，以妥善處理並取得保險。

all.en: All confidential files should be locked in the secure cabinets provided by corporate security before Friday afternoon.
all.zh: 所有機密檔案應於星期五下午前鎖入企業安全部門提供的保險櫃中。

all.en: Remote employees who normally visit the office quarterly will receive updated access badges by mail within two weeks.
all.zh: 通常每季造訪辦公室的遠距員工將於兩週內以郵寄方式收到更新的門禁卡。

all.en: The cafeteria on the third floor will open the same day, offering subsidized lunch menus for all staff members.
all.zh: 三樓員工餐廳將於同日開放，為所有員工提供補貼午餐菜單。

all.en: Wellness rooms, prayer spaces, and lactation facilities are clearly marked throughout the new floor plan.
all.zh: 新樓層平面圖上清楚標示了健康室、祈禱空間及哺乳設施。

all.en: Employees are encouraged to review the building safety briefing video before their first day at the new address.
all.zh: 鼓勵員工在新地址第一天上班前先觀看大樓安全簡報影片。

all.en: Emergency evacuation drills will be scheduled within the first month to familiarize everyone with the new exits.
all.zh: 緊急疏散演習將於第一個月內安排，讓所有人熟悉新的逃生出口。

all.en: Please update your business cards and email signatures with the new address by the end of July.
all.zh: 請於 7 月底前更新您名片及電子郵件簽名上的新地址。

all.en: Thank you again for your continued dedication as we begin this exciting new chapter together.
all.zh: 再次感謝您持續的努力，讓我們一起展開這個令人興奮的新篇章。

all.en: A detailed floor plan with desk assignments will be distributed by email on July 14.
all.zh: 詳細的樓層平面圖及座位分配將於 7 月 14 日以電子郵件寄發。

all.en: Visitors and clients should be informed of the new address at least one week before any scheduled meeting.
all.zh: 訪客及客戶應於任何預定會議至少一週前獲知新地址。

all.en: Mailroom services will resume operations at the new headquarters on the morning of July 21.
all.zh: 郵件收發室將於 7 月 21 日早晨在新總部恢復運作。

all.en: Employees with reserved bicycle storage should re-register their bikes through the facilities portal by July 15.
all.zh: 擁有預留腳踏車停放位置的員工應於 7 月 15 日前透過設施入口網站重新登記其腳踏車。

all.en: The relocation committee will host weekly virtual office hours every Wednesday at 2:00 P.M. throughout July.
all.zh: 搬遷委員會將於整個 7 月每週三下午 2 點舉辦線上辦公時間。

all.en: Vendor deliveries should be rerouted to the new loading dock entrance on Pier Street starting July 20.
all.zh: 供應商送貨應於 7 月 20 日起改道至 Pier 街的新裝卸碼頭入口。

all.en: Personal plants and decorations may be transported individually but must remain within reasonable size and weight limits.
all.zh: 個人植物及裝飾品可自行搬運，但須維持在合理的尺寸及重量範圍內。

all.en: Lost or damaged items during the move should be reported to the operations department within five business days.
all.zh: 搬遷過程中遺失或損壞的物品應於五個工作天內向營運部門通報。

all.en: Photographs of the ribbon-cutting ceremony will be shared on the company intranet later that week.
all.zh: 剪綵儀式的照片將於該週稍後在公司內部網站分享。

all.en: We look forward to welcoming everyone into a workspace designed for collaboration, innovation, and long-term growth.
all.zh: 我們期待歡迎每位同仁進入一個為協作、創新及長期成長而設計的工作空間。
